```{=html}

<div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; width: 100%; align-items: stretch;">

    <div style="flex: 1 1 calc(25% - 10px); margin: 5px; box-sizing: border-box; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; max-width: 200px; flex-shrink: 1;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/metas/person/person/address_detail/christoph_huettl_md/" target="_blank" style="flex-grow: 1;">
            <img src="https://neurologie.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/neurologie/Mitarbeiter_neu/HueC_297x337.jpg" style="width: 100%; height: auto; max-width: 100px; object-fit: cover; margin-bottom: 0; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
        <p style="font-size: 1vw; margin-top: 5px;"><strong>Christoph Huettl</strong></p>
    </div>
    
    <div style="flex: 1 1 calc(25% - 10px); margin: 5px; box-sizing: border-box; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; max-width: 200px; flex-shrink: 1;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/metas/person/person/address_detail/rico_schmitt_msc-1/" target="_blank" style="flex-grow: 1;">
            <img src="https://neurologie.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/neurologie/Mitarbeiter_neu/SchmittR_297x337.png" style="width: 100%; height: auto; max-width: 100px; object-fit: cover; margin-bottom: 0; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
        <p style="font-size: 1vw; margin-top: 5px;"><strong>Rico Schmitt</strong></p>
    </div>
    
    <div style="flex: 1 1 calc(25% - 10px); margin: 5px; box-sizing: border-box; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; max-width: 200px; flex-shrink: 1;">
        <a href="https://codemart.ro/codemart/zwei/crew" target="_blank" style="flex-grow: 1;">
            <img src="https://codemart.ro/codemart/img/53/portrait_leader@2x" style="width: 100%; height: auto; max-width: 100px; object-fit: cover; margin-bottom: 0; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
        <p style="font-size: 1vw; margin-top: 5px;"><strong>Lia Domide</strong></p>
    </div>
    
    <div style="flex: 1 1 calc(25% - 10px); margin: 5px; box-sizing: border-box; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; max-width: 200px; flex-shrink: 1;">
        <a href="#" target="_blank" style="flex-grow: 1;">
            <img src="https://codemart.ro/codemart/img/4878/portrait_staff@2x" style="width: 100%; height: auto; max-width: 100px; object-fit: cover; margin-bottom: 0; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
        <p style="font-size: 1vw; margin-top: 5px;"><strong>Romina Baila</strong></p>
    </div>
    
    <div style="flex: 1 1 calc(25% - 10px); margin: 5px; box-sizing: border-box; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; max-width: 200px; flex-shrink: 1;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/metas/person/person/address_detail/dr_jil_meier/" target="_blank" style="flex-grow: 1;">
            <img src="https://neurologie.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/neurologie/Mitarbeiter_neu/MeyerJ_297x337.jpg" style="width: 100%; height: auto; max-width: 100px; object-fit: cover; margin-bottom: 0; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
        <p style="font-size: 1vw; margin-top: 5px;"><strong>Jil Meier</strong></p>
    </div>
    
    <div style="flex: 1 1 calc(25% - 10px); margin: 5px; box-sizing: border-box; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; max-width: 200px; flex-shrink: 1;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/metas/person/person/address_detail/dr_med_konstantin_buelau_md/" target="_blank" style="flex-grow: 1;">
            <img src="https://brainsimulation.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/gehirnsimulation/konstantin_337.jpg" style="width: 100%; height: auto; max-width: 100px; object-fit: cover; margin-bottom: 0; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
        <p style="font-size: 1vw; margin-top: 5px;"><strong>Konstantin Buelau</strong></p>
    </div>
    
    <div style="flex: 1 1 calc(25% - 10px); margin: 5px; box-sizing: border-box; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; max-width: 200px; flex-shrink: 1;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/en/metas/person_detail/person/address_detail/dr_dionysios_perdikis-1/" target="_blank" style="flex-grow: 1;">
            <img src="https://neurologie.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/neurologie/Mitarbeiter_neu/perdikis_d_297x337.jpg" style="width: 100%; height: auto; max-width: 100px; object-fit: cover; margin-bottom: 0; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
        <p style="font-size: 1vw; margin-top: 5px;"><strong>Dionysios Perdikis</strong></p>
    </div>
    
    <div style="flex: 1 1 calc(25% - 10px); margin: 5px; box-sizing: border-box; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; max-width: 200px; flex-shrink: 1;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/en/metas/person_detail/person/address_detail/halgurd_taher_msc_phd-1/" target="_blank" style="flex-grow: 1;">
            <img src="https://neurologie.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/neurologie/Mitarbeiter_neu/TaherT_297x337.jpg" style="width: 100%; height: auto; max-width: 100px; object-fit: cover; margin-bottom: 0; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
        <p style="font-size: 1vw; margin-top: 5px;"><strong>Halgurd Taher</strong></p>
    </div>
    
    <div style="flex: 1 1 calc(25% - 10px); margin: 5px; box-sizing: border-box; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; max-width: 200px; flex-shrink: 1;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/en/metas/person_detail/person/address_detail/dr_dionysios_perdikis-1/" target="_blank" style="flex-grow: 1;">
            <img src="https://neurologie.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/neurologie/Mitarbeiter_neu/schirner-m_297x337.jpg" style="width: 100%; height: auto; max-width: 100px; object-fit: cover; margin-bottom: 0; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
        <p style="font-size: 1vw; margin-top: 5px;"><strong>Michael Schirner</strong></p>
    </div>
    
    <div style="flex: 1 1 calc(25% - 10px); margin: 5px; box-sizing: border-box; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; max-width: 200px; flex-shrink: 1;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/en/metas/person_detail/person/address_detail/leon_stefanovski_md/" target="_blank" style="flex-grow: 1;">
            <img src="https://brainsimulation.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/gehirnsimulation/charite_photo_big-337-leon.jpg" style="width: 100%; height: auto; max-width: 100px; object-fit: cover; margin-bottom: 0; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
        <p style="font-size: 1vw; margin-top: 5px;"><strong>Leon Stefanovski</strong></p>
    </div>
    
    <div style="flex: 1 1 calc(25% - 10px); margin: 5px; box-sizing: border-box; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; max-width: 200px; flex-shrink: 1;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/metas/person/person/address_detail/univ_prof_dr_med_petra_ritter/" target="_blank" style="flex-grow: 1;">
            <img src="https://brainsimulation.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/gehirnsimulation/Ritter_155x200.png" style="width: 100%; height: auto; max-width: 100px; object-fit: cover; margin-bottom: 0; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
        <p style="font-size: 1vw; margin-top: 5px;"><strong>Petra Ritter</strong></p>
    </div>
    </div>
```
